title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Khadim's Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khadim's Capital India:
Khadim's Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's Capital India!
